tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: My friends are inviting me to go out soon, but my midterm tomorrow means I could still benefit from studying a bit more.
Mina declined the invitation, which might free up time for my last-minute studying before tomorrow's midterm.
I spent two hours studying and improved my progress, but I missed the opportunity to go out with friends since the window has closed.
My study progress is high, but I feel the missed social opportunity and accumulated stress are weighing on me despite the academic gain.
After sleeping 8 hours, my energy is fully restored and sleep debt is cleared, which should help manage the stress I felt from missing social time.
My midterm study is now complete, and with full energy restored from sleep, I can address the remaining social obligation before the exam begins.
Joining the social club immediately after completing my studies and resting feels like a balanced recovery from my earlier stress.
